gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) will have been built。「By + 未來時間」搭配未來完成被動式 will have been + p.p.。(A) will be built 為未來簡單被動。(C) are being built 為現在進行被動。(D) have been built 為現在完成被動，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The road ___ at the moment, so we'd better take an alternative route.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) is being repaired。「正在被修復」用現在進行被動 is being + p.p.。(A) is repairing 為主動進行。(C) is repaired 為現在簡單被動。(B) has repaired 為現在完成主動，皆不符。

gept.question_en: All the documents ___ before the lawyer arrived at the office.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) had been signed。文件由人簽署，且發生於另一過去動作之前，需用過去完成被動式。(B) had signed 為主動。(C) have been signed 為現在完成被動。(D) were signing 為過去進行主動，皆不符。

gept.question_en: She doesn't enjoy ___ in public; it makes her really nervous.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) speaking。enjoy 後接動名詞。(A) to speak 為不定詞。(B) speak 為原形。(D) spoken 為過去分詞，皆不符 enjoy 用法。

gept.question_en: I remember ___ off all the lights before I left the house this morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) turning。remember + Ving 表「記得做過某事」；remember + to V 表「記得要做某事」。本題語意為已完成的動作，用 Ving。(A) to turn 表「記得要去做」與時態不合。(C)(D) 皆無法搭配 remember。

gept.question_en: Don't forget ___ the milk on your way home from work tonight.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to buy。forget + to V 表「忘了要去做」。(A) buying 為「忘記做過」，與語意 (on your way home) 不符。(C)(D) 不可直接接於 forget 之後。

gept.question_en: I regret ___ you that your application has been rejected by the committee.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to tell。regret + to V 表「很遺憾地要告訴 (現在/未來)」；regret + Ving 表「後悔做過」。本題用於正式宣布壞消息。(A) telling 表「後悔曾告知」，與當下宣布不符。(C)(D) 結構錯誤。

gept.question_en: I'm not used to ___ up so early; my body still needs some time to adjust.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) getting。be used to + Ving 表「習慣於」。(A) get 為原形 (used to + V 表過去習慣)。(C) got 為過去式。(B) have got 為完成式，皆不符結構。

gept.question_en: Would you mind ___ me a hand with these heavy boxes for a moment?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) giving。mind 後接動名詞。(A) give 為原形。(B) to give 為不定詞。(D) given 為過去分詞，皆不符 mind 用法。

gept.question_en: He admitted ___ the window with the baseball, but said it was just an accident.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) breaking。admit 後接動名詞。(B) to break 為不定詞。(C) break 為原形。(D) broken 為過去分詞，皆不符 admit 用法。

gept.question_en: The little boy refused ___ his vegetables despite his mother's repeated requests.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to eat。refuse 後接不定詞。(A) eating 為動名詞。(C) eat 為原形。(D) having eaten 為完成動名詞，皆不符 refuse 結構。

gept.question_en: The teacher made the students ___ silent during the entire examination.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) keep。make 為使役動詞，後接受詞 + 原形動詞。(A) to keep 為不定詞，不符使役結構。(B) keeping 為動名詞。(C) kept 為過去分詞，皆不正確。

gept.question_en: She had her hair ___ at the new salon downtown last Saturday.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) cut。have + 物 + p.p. (cut 的過去分詞同形) 表「請人做某事」。(B) cutting 為動名詞主動。(C) to cut 為不定詞。(D) cuts 為動詞單數現在式，皆不符使役被動結構。

gept.question_en: I'll get my brother ___ me to the airport tomorrow morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to drive。get + 受詞 + to V 表「使某人做某事」。(A) drive 為原形 (用於 have/make)。(C) driving 為現在分詞。(D) driven 為過去分詞 (被動)，皆不符 get 結構。

gept.question_en: The boss let his employees ___ home early because of the heavy rain.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) go。let 為使役動詞，後接受詞 + 原形。(A) to go 為不定詞。(B) going 為動名詞。(C) gone 為過去分詞，皆不符 let 結構。

gept.question_en: The man ___ is sitting at the corner table is our company's new CEO.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) who。先行詞為人 (the man) 且關係子句中作主詞，用 who。(A) which 用於物。(C) whose 為所有格。(D) whom 為受格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: This is the book ___ I told you about during our chat last weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) which。先行詞為物 (the book) 且關係子句中作介系詞受詞，用 which 或 that。(A) who 用於人。(B) what 不引導關係子句 (本身包含先行詞)。(C) whose 為所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Mr. Wang, ___ has been our family doctor for twenty years, is retiring this summer.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) who。非限定關係子句 (有逗號) 中，先行詞為人作主詞用 who，不可用 that。(A) that 不用於非限定子句。(B) which 用於物。(D) whom 為受格，不符主詞用法。

gept.question_en: Do you remember the day ___ we first met at the language exchange café?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) when。先行詞為時間 (the day)，關係副詞用 when。(A) which 需後接缺主詞或受詞的子句。(B) what 不引導關係子句。(D) where 用於地點，皆不符。

gept.question_en: That's the small village ___ my grandparents have lived since they got married.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) where。先行詞為地點 (village)，關係副詞用 where。(A) which 後須接缺主詞或受詞的子句，但 lived 為不及物。(C) when 用於時間。(B) what 不引導關係子句，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Please tell me the reason ___ you decided to quit your stable job in the bank.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) why。先行詞為 reason，關係副詞用 why。(A) which 須接缺成分的子句。(B) where 用於地點。(C) what 不引導關係子句，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Everyone ___ attended the wedding had a wonderful time at the reception.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) who。先行詞為人 (everyone) 作主詞用 who。(A) whose 為所有格。(B) whom 為受格。(C) which 用於物，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The hotel ___ we stayed in last year has changed its name and management.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) which。先行詞為物 (hotel) 作介系詞 in 的受詞，用 which 或 that。注意：where 不能用，因為句中已有介系詞 in。(B) what 不引導關係子句。(C) whose 為所有格。(D) where = in which，但此句已含 in，不可重複。

gept.question_en: The teacher told the noisy class ___ quiet immediately.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to be。tell + 受詞 + to V (間接命令)。(A) be 為原形。(C) being 為動名詞。(D) been 為過去分詞，皆不符結構。

gept.question_en: She asked me ___ I had ever been to Korea before this trip.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) if。間接問句若為 yes/no 問句，用 if 或 whether 引導。(A) that 用於陳述子句。(B) what 用於問內容。(D) which 用於選擇，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The reporter asked the politician ___ he planned to run for president again.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) whether。間接 yes/no 問句用 whether (或 if)。(A) that 引導陳述。(C) what 用於問內容。(D) which 用於選擇，皆不符。

gept.question_en: My mother told me ___ stay out too late on a school night.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) not to。間接命令的否定為 not + to V。(B) don't 為直接引述形式。(C) to not 不符標準語序 (雖有人用於分裂不定詞，但 GEPT 採 not to)。(D) no to 不符語法。

gept.question_en: Never ___ I seen such an amazing fireworks display in my entire life.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) have。否定副詞 never 置句首引發倒裝，「Never have I + p.p.」表「從未...」。(B) had 表過去完成，但語意 in my entire life 含現在，現在完成式較適。(C) did 不能搭配 seen。(D) would 為情態，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Hardly ___ the bus stop when the bus pulled up right in front of him.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) had he reached。Hardly...when... 結構搭配過去完成式倒裝。(A) he reached 為一般語序。(C) did he reach 為過去簡單倒裝，但 hardly 須用過去完成。(B) he had reached 為非倒裝語序，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Not until she got home ___ realize she had left her phone in the office.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) did she。Not until 引導句首時，主句倒裝。從句為過去式 got，主句助動詞用 did。(A) 非倒裝。(C)(D) 為現在完成式，時態不符。

gept.question_en: Seldom ___ such a moving performance on a school stage.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) have I seen。Seldom 置句首倒裝，搭配現在完成式。(A) 非倒裝。(C) 非倒裝。(D) did I see 雖倒裝但時態為過去簡單，與「至今所見」不符。

gept.question_en: Not only ___ the marathon, but she also raised money for charity.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) did she finish。Not only 置句首倒裝，過去式用 did + 主詞 + 原形。(A) 非倒裝。(B) 詞序不對。(D) 非倒裝，皆不符。

gept.question_en: I wish I ___ how to play the guitar; I'd love to start a band.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) knew。wish + 過去式表「對現在的遺憾」。(A) know 為直述。(C) had known 表對過去的遺憾。(D) would know 不可用於 wish 子句中表「希望我自己」。

gept.question_en: She talks ___ she were the boss, but she's actually just an intern.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) as if。as if + 過去式表「彷彿，與事實相反」。(A) as 為「正如」。(C) even though 為「儘管」。(B) while 為「當...時」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: The committee suggested that the proposal ___ further reviewed before approval.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) be。suggest 後的 that 子句用假設語氣 (should) be + p.p.，可省略 should。(A) is 為直述。(B) was 為過去式。(C) to be 為不定詞，皆不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: It's high time we ___ taking climate change seriously.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) started。It's high time + 主詞 + 過去式，表「早該...」的假設語氣。(A) start 為原形。(C) have started 為現在完成式。(D) will start 為未來式，皆不符結構。

gept.question_en: If only she ___ the truth instead of lying to her best friend.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) had told。「lying to her best friend」暗示已經發生，過去的遺憾用 If only + 過去完成式。(A) tells 為現在式。(B) told 表對現在的遺憾。(D) would tell 不符 if only 用法。

gept.question_en: He behaves ___ he owned the entire office building.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) as if。as if + 過去式表「彷彿，與事實相反」。(A) like 後接名詞或代名詞，不接子句 (口語例外)。(C) even if 為「即使」。(D) since 為「自從」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: The doctor insisted that his patient ___ in bed for at least three days.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) stay。insist that 子句用假設語氣 (should) + 原形，可省略 should。(A) stays 為現在式。(B) stayed 為過去式。(D) would stay 為未來假設，皆不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: It is essential that every passenger ___ a valid passport at the check-in counter.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) show。It is essential that 子句用假設語氣 (should) + 原形，可省略 should。(B) shows 為現在式。(C) showed 為過去式。(D) showing 為動名詞，皆不符。

gept.question_en: She has been studying Japanese ___ she moved to Kyoto five years ago.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) since。since 後接時間起點 (moved to Kyoto)，搭配完成進行式。(A) for 後接期間。(C) during 後接特定時段名詞。(D) while 為「當...時」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Although the weather was terrible, the football match ___ played as scheduled.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) was。「天氣很糟」用過去式，主句也用過去被動 was played。(B) had been played 為過去完成被動，時態不需。(C) is 為現在式。(D) has been 為現在完成被動，皆不符。

gept.question_en: She works ___ hard as her colleagues, but earns much less money.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) as。as...as 為同等比較結構。(A) so...as 多用於否定句。(B) very...as 無此結構。(C) too...as 也無此結構，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The harder you work, ___ chance you have of success.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) the more。「the + 比較級, the + 比較級」結構表「越...越...」。(B) more 缺定冠詞 the。(C) the most 為最高級。(D) the much 不符比較級用法。

gept.question_en: By the time I finish my report, everyone else ___ already gone home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) will have。「By the time + 現在簡單式」搭配未來完成式 will have + p.p.。(A) will 為未來簡單。(C) has 為現在完成。(B) had 為過去完成，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The new policy ___ since the beginning of this year, and the results are encouraging.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) has been implemented。政策由人實施，且 since 搭配現在完成被動式。(A) implements 為主動現在式。(B) has implemented 為主動完成。(D) is implementing 為主動進行，皆不符被動或時態。

gept.question_en: ___ in 1820, this old temple is one of the oldest buildings in our city.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) Built。過去分詞構句表被動，「被建於 1820 年」。(B) Building 為主動現在分詞。(C) To build 為不定詞。(D) Having built 為主動完成式，皆不符被動語意。

gept.question_en: ___ that the train was delayed, she decided to take a taxi instead.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) Realizing。分詞構句表原因，用現在分詞。(A) Realize 為原形。(B) Realized 為過去式或被動分詞，語意不符 (人主動意識到)。(C) To realize 為不定詞表目的，皆不符。

gept.question_en: After ___ his master's degree, he plans to start his own software company.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) finishing。介系詞 after 後接動名詞。(A) finish 為原形。(B) finished 為過去式。(C) to finish 為不定詞，皆不符介系詞 + Ving。

gept.question_en: The students were warned ___ during the chemistry experiment for safety reasons.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) not to play。warn + 受詞 + (not) to V (被動則為 be warned not to V)。(B) to not play 為分裂不定詞，GEPT 採 not to。(C) not playing 為動名詞。(D) don't play 為直接祈使，皆不符。

gept.question_en: You can borrow my laptop ___ you return it to me before tonight.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) as long as。「只要...就...」用 as long as。(A) unless 為「除非」。(C) even if 為「即使」。(D) because 為「因為」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: ___ that he had lost his keys, John climbed in through the back window.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) Finding。分詞構句表原因用現在分詞。(A) Find 為原形。(B) Found 為過去式/被動分詞。(D) Having finding 為錯誤組合 (應為 Having found)，皆不符。

gept.question_en: I haven't decided ___ I should attend the conference or stay home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) whether。表「是否...或...」用 whether (常與 or 搭配)。(A) if 在 or 結構中較不正式且文法書多偏好 whether。(C) that 用於陳述子句。(D) which 用於問選擇但語法不合，皆不如 whether。

gept.question_en: She had her wisdom teeth ___ at the dental clinic last weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) removed。have + 物 + p.p. 表「請人做某事」。(A) remove 為原形。(B) removing 為動名詞。(D) to remove 為不定詞，皆不符使役被動結構。

gept.question_en: It was such an interesting documentary ___ I watched it twice in one weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) that。such...that... 為「如此...以致於...」的結果句型。(A) as 多用於 such...as 表「如同」。(C) than 用於比較。(D) which 為關係代名詞，皆不符結果句型。

gept.question_en: He runs ___ fast that nobody in the school can catch up with him.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) so。so + adv./adj. + that 表「如此...以致於...」。(A) such 後接名詞。(B) very 無對應 that 結構。(C) too...to 用於不定詞，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Please remember to take ___ umbrella with you; it might rain this afternoon.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) the。雖一般 umbrella 為 an umbrella，但本題語境暗示「你的那把傘」或特定的某把，加上「Please remember to take」常指對話雙方都知道的傘，用定冠詞 the 較自然 (亦可接受 an，但題目選項中 the 為最妥當答案)。(A) a 用於子音開頭。(B) an 雖文法可，但語意上 the 更指特定那把。(D) 無冠詞不合語法。

gept.question_en: Only after ___ the homework can the students go out to play.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) finishing。介系詞 after 後接動名詞。(A) finish 為原形。(C) finished 為過去式/分詞。(B) to finish 為不定詞，皆不符介系詞 + Ving。

gept.question_en: She is the only student in our class ___ has won an international science award.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) who。先行詞為人 (student) 作主詞，用 who。注意：先行詞含 only 時，傳統上偏好 that，但 who 在現代英語廣泛接受。(B) which 用於物。(C) whose 為所有格。(D) whom 為受格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Many of the photos ___ at the exhibition were taken by amateur photographers.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) displayed。過去分詞作後置形容詞，表被動「被展出的」。(A) display 為原形。(B) displaying 為主動分詞。(D) to display 為不定詞，皆不符被動修飾語。

gept.question_en: I'd rather ___ at home tonight than ___ to the noisy night market again.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) stay / go。would rather + 原形 + than + 原形。(A) 加 to 不符。(B) 動名詞不符。(C) 過去式不符 would rather 結構。

gept.question_en: No sooner had the bell rung ___ the students rushed out of the classroom.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) than。No sooner...than... 為固定搭配。(A) when 與 hardly 搭配。(C)(D) 皆不符 no sooner 句型。

gept.question_en: The book ___ cover is missing belongs to the library on the second floor.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) whose。表「物的所有格」也可用 whose。(A) which 需作主詞或受詞，但此處需所有格。(B) who 用於人主格。(D) that 不可作所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: He bought a brand-new camera, ___ cost him almost two months' salary.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) which。非限定子句 (有逗號) 中物的主詞用 which，且此處 which 指整件事 (買了相機這件事)。(A) that 不用於非限定子句。(C) what 不引導關係子句。(D) it 不可引導子句，皆不符。

gept.question_en: She is one of the few students ___ have been accepted by all three universities.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) who。先行詞為 students (人) 作主詞，用 who。(B) whom 為受格。(C) whose 為所有格。(D) which 用於物，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Please ___ a careful look at the contract before you sign it.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) take。祈使句 Please + 原形動詞。(B) taking 為動名詞。(C) to take 為不定詞。(D) took 為過去式，皆不符祈使句結構。

gept.question_en: Not until the rain stopped ___ they continue their hiking trip.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) could。Not until 句首倒裝；hiking 為過去事件 (rain stopped)，搭配 could 表「才能」。(A) did 後接原形且無法傳遞「才能/才得以」之意。(B) had 不搭配 continue 原形。(D) do 為現在式，不符過去語境。

gept.question_en: She not only ___ three languages but also plays four musical instruments.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) speaks。Not only 置於主詞後不倒裝；搭配 plays (現在式) 須用現在式 speaks。(B) is speaking 為現在進行式。(C) spoke 為過去式。(D) has spoken 為現在完成式，皆與 plays 不對應。

gept.question_en: The new manager ___ to be very strict but also fair with her staff.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) is said。「人們說...」被動句型 sb. is said to V。(B) is saying 為主動進行。(C) said 為主動過去。(D) has said 為主動完成，皆不符被動結構。

gept.question_en: He is believed ___ a fortune in the stock market over the past five years.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) to have made。be believed to + 完成不定詞表「相信他過去已...」(over the past five years)。(A) to make 表現在或未來動作。(B) to be making 表現在進行。(D) making 為動名詞，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Children ___ to spend more time outdoors than playing on electronic devices.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) should be encouraged。情態助動詞 + 被動 = should + be + p.p.。(A) should encourage 為主動。(C) 結構錯誤。(B) should have encouraged 為主動完成。

gept.question_en: It was at this old café ___ I first met my husband twenty years ago.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) that。強調句型 It is/was + 強調部分 + that...。即使強調的是地點，分裂句也用 that。(A) which 不適用分裂句強調地點。(B) where 為關係副詞，分裂句固定用 that。(C) when 用於強調時間時也可改用 that，本題介系詞片語用 that 較佳。

gept.question_en: The film is so popular that tickets ___ out within hours of going on sale.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) sell。sell out 為不及物用法，「售完」可用主動表被動意義。(B) sold 為過去式，搭配 are sold within hours 結構不通順 (動詞時態不對應前句 is)。(C) are sold 雖文法可，但與 sell out 慣用語不同。(D) are selling 為進行式，皆不符通用慣例。

gept.question_en: Had I realized how dangerous the road was, I ___ a different route.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) would have taken。第三條件句倒裝 Had + 主詞 + p.p.，主句用 would have + p.p.。(A) would take 為第二條件。(C) took 為過去直述。(D) had taken 為過去完成，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Were it not for the bad weather, the outdoor concert ___ on as planned.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) would go。「Were it not for」為「If it were not for」倒裝，第二條件 (對現在/未來假設)，主句用 would + 原形。(A) will go 不可在條件句後。(C) would have gone 為第三條件。(D) had gone 為過去完成，皆不符。

gept.question_en: I can't stand ___ in long lines just to buy a cup of bubble tea.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) waiting。can't stand + Ving 表「無法忍受做某事」。(A) to wait 為不定詞。(C) wait 為原形。(D) waited 為過去式，皆不符 stand + Ving 慣用法。

gept.question_en: She is busy ___ for her final exam, so please don't disturb her.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) preparing。be busy + Ving 為固定用法。(A) to prepare 為不定詞。(C) prepare 為原形。(B) prepared 為過去式，皆不符 busy + Ving 結構。

gept.question_en: Several students were caught ___ during the final examination last semester.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) cheating。catch + 受詞 + Ving 表「當場逮到正在做」；被動為 be caught + Ving。(A) cheat 為原形。(B) to cheat 為不定詞。(D) cheated 為過去式，皆不符 catch + Ving 結構。

gept.question_en: If you ___ him tomorrow, please remind him about the appointment.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) see。第一條件句的 if 子句用現在簡單式表未來。(B) will see 不可用於條件子句。(C) would see 為第二條件。(D) saw 為過去式，皆不符。

gept.question_en: By next month, I ___ in this neighborhood for ten years exactly.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) will have lived。「By + 未來時間」搭配未來完成式表「到那時為止已...」。(A) lived 為過去式。(B) will live 為未來簡單，無累積時長。(D) have lived 為現在完成式，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The new policy ___ effect from the first of next month onwards.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) will take。表「未來生效」用 will take effect。雖然 takes (現在簡單表既定未來) 也可，但句中 will 更精確表預定發生於未來。(B) takes 較不正式且常用於時刻表。(C) took 為過去式。(D) has taken 為現在完成式。

gept.question_en: The novel ___ I'm reading now was written by a famous Taiwanese author.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) that。先行詞為物 (novel) 作受詞，用 that 或 which。(A) who 用於人。(B) whom 為人的受格。(C) whose 為所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: He gave me a present, ___ I really appreciated although it wasn't expensive.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) which。非限定子句 (有逗號) 中物的受詞用 which。(A) what 不引導關係子句。(B) that 不用於非限定子句。(D) whose 為所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: There's a small problem ___ I'd like to discuss with you before we begin.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) which。先行詞為物 (problem) 作受詞，用 which 或 that。(A) what 不引導關係子句。(B) who 用於人。(D) whose 為所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: She isn't sure ___ to attend the conference in Singapore or stay in Taiwan.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) whether。whether + to V 表「是否要...」，常與 or 搭配。(A) that 不接 to V。(B) if 不接 to V (if 後接子句)。(C) either 與 or 搭配但語法不符 (either to V 不常用)，皆不如 whether + to V。

gept.question_en: It was John ___ broke the window while playing baseball in the backyard.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) who。分裂句 It was + 人 + who/that... 強調主詞。(A) which 用於物。(B) what 不引導關係子句。(D) whose 為所有格，皆不符。

gept.question_en: It was on a Sunday morning ___ my grandmother passed away peacefully at home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) that。分裂句 It was + 時間 + that... 強調時間。(A) when 為關係副詞，分裂句固定用 that。(C) which 用於物。(D) where 用於地點，皆不符分裂句結構。

gept.question_en: If I ___ you, I would think twice before quitting that well-paid job.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) were。第二條件句假設語氣，be 動詞用 were。(A) am 為直述。(B) was 雖口語可接受，正式文法用 were。(D) had been 為第三條件，與主句 would think 不符。

gept.question_en: She suggested that he ___ a doctor about his constant headaches.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) see。suggest that + 主詞 + (should) + 原形動詞 (假設語氣，should 可省)。(B) sees 為現在式。(C) saw 為過去式。(D) will see 為未來式，皆不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: She objected to ___ alone with such a stranger at this hour.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) being left。object to 中 to 為介系詞 + Ving，且語意為「被留下」用被動動名詞 being + p.p.。(A) leave 為原形。(B) leaving 為主動。(C) be left 為被動原形，皆不符。

gept.question_en: After ___ for over three hours, the doctor finally came out of the operating room.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) operating。介系詞 after 後接動名詞。(D) having operated 為完成式動名詞，雖文法可，但在 after 之後通常用簡單動名詞 operating。(A) operate 為原形。(B) operated 為過去式。

gept.question_en: He denied ___ the cookies, but his mother found crumbs all over his shirt.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) eating。deny + Ving 表「否認做過某事」。(A) eat 為原形。(B) to eat 為不定詞。(C) ate 為過去式，皆不符 deny + Ving 用法。

gept.question_en: She ought ___ harder if she wants to pass the entrance exam this June.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to study。ought to + 原形動詞，「to」為固定搭配的一部分。(A) study 缺 to。(C) studying 為動名詞。(D) studied 為過去式，皆不符 ought to + V 結構。

gept.question_en: I had to have my computer ___ because the hard drive crashed last week.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) repaired。have + 物 + p.p. 表「請人做某事」。(A) repair 為原形。(C) repairing 為動名詞。(D) to repair 為不定詞，皆不符使役被動結構。

gept.question_en: The teacher made all the students ___ their phones in the front of the classroom.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) leave。make 為使役動詞，後接受詞 + 原形動詞。(B) to leave 為不定詞 (make 主動不接 to)。(C) leaving 為動名詞。(D) left 為過去分詞，皆不符 make 主動結構。

gept.question_en: It's no use ___ over spilled milk; we need to find a solution instead.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) crying。It's no use + Ving 表「...是沒用的」。(A) to cry 為不定詞。(B) cry 為原形。(D) cried 為過去式，皆不符 no use + Ving 慣用語。

gept.question_en: Would you like ___ to my birthday party this Saturday evening?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) to come。would like + to V 表「想要做某事」。(A) come 為原形。(B) coming 為動名詞。(D) came 為過去式，皆不符 would like + to V。

gept.question_en: By the time the rescue team arrived, the climbers ___ for two days without food.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) had been waiting。「在過去某時點之前已持續進行的動作」用過去完成進行式。(B) have been waiting 為現在完成進行。(C) were waiting 為過去進行式，無法表達「兩天」累積。(D) had waited 為過去完成，但 had been waiting 更強調延續性。

gept.question_en: Despite ___ very hard, he still failed to get into his dream university.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) studying。介系詞 Despite 後接動名詞或名詞。(A) studied 為過去式。(C) to study 為不定詞。(B) he studied 為子句 (應用 although)，皆不符 despite 用法。

gept.question_en: Such ___ his anger that he slammed the door and walked out of the room.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) was。「Such + be 動詞 + 主詞 + that」倒裝結構，搭配過去動作 (slammed, walked) 用 was。(A) is 為現在式。(C) has been 為現在完成。(D) had been 為過去完成，皆不符過去簡單。

gept.question_en: On no account ___ leave the building during the fire drill, even for a moment.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) should you。On no account 為否定片語置句首引發倒裝。(A) 非倒裝。(C) 非倒裝。(D) do you 不搭配 leave 表建議或義務。

gept.question_en: I'm not sure ___ to wear to the formal dinner this Friday night.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) what。what + to V 表「該...什麼」。(B) that 不接 to V。(C) which 通常需特定選項。(D) if 不接 to V，皆不符。

gept.question_en: He spoke so quickly that I couldn't catch ___ he was trying to say.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) what。what 引導名詞子句作 catch 的受詞，表「他想說的東西」(what = the thing(s) that)。(A) that 須有明確先行詞。(B) which 需有選項。(C) if 為「是否」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Some say that he ___ the truth, but I'm beginning to have my doubts.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) is telling。語境暗示「他現在正在說」，搭配 I'm beginning (現在進行式) 用現在進行式 is telling。(A) tells 為一般習慣。(C) told 為過去式。(D) has told 為現在完成式，皆不符當下情境。

gept.question_en: Not a single mistake ___ in her final report; the boss was very impressed.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) was found。否定主詞 + 過去被動式。(B) found 為主動。(C) was finding 為過去進行主動。(D) has found 為現在完成主動，皆不符被動或時態。

gept.question_en: He insisted on ___ the bill, even though we offered to split it with him.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) paying。insist on + Ving 為固定搭配。(A) pay 為原形。(B) to pay 為不定詞。(D) paid 為過去式，皆不符 insist on + Ving。

gept.question_en: Were she here now, she ___ exactly what to do about this difficult situation.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) would know。「Were she...」為第二條件倒裝 (對現在假設)，主句用 would + 原形。(A) knows 為直述現在式。(B) knew 為過去式。(D) would have known 為第三條件，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The conference ___ when the speaker suddenly fell ill and had to be taken to hospital.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) had just begun。「在另一個過去動作之前剛發生」用過去完成式。(A) began 為過去簡單，無「剛開始」之意。(C) begins 為現在式。(B) has begun 為現在完成式，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The applicants ___ to bring two photos and a copy of their ID to the interview.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) are asked。被動式 be + p.p. + to V 表「被要求做某事」。(A) asked 為主動過去式。(C) asking 為現在分詞。(D) have asked 為主動完成式，皆不符被動。

gept.question_en: Owing to the heavy snow, all the flights ___ until further notice.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) have been canceled。航班被取消，現在完成被動式。(A) cancel 為主動現在式。(B) have canceled 為主動完成。(C) are canceling 為主動進行，皆不符被動。

gept.question_en: The new highway, ___ took over five years to build, finally opens this Sunday.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) which。非限定子句 (有逗號) 中物的主詞用 which。(A) that 不用於非限定。(B) what 不引導關係子句。(D) it 不可引導子句，皆不符。

gept.question_en: Many things ___ to me since I last visited this hometown a decade ago.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) have happened。「since + 過去時間」搭配現在完成式 (happen 為非延續動詞用 have + p.p.)。(A) happen 為現在式。(B) happened 不能搭配 since。(D) are happening 為現在進行式，皆不符。

gept.question_en: While ___ the dishes, she suddenly heard a loud crash from the living room.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) washing。while + Ving 為分詞構句，表「當...時」。(A) wash 為原形。(B) washed 為過去式或被動分詞。(D) to wash 為不定詞，皆不符 while + Ving 結構。

gept.question_en: It is no wonder that he failed the exam, ___ he didn't study at all.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) because。表「他根本沒讀書」是失敗的原因，用 because。(B) though 為「儘管」。(C) so 為「所以」。(D) but 為「但是」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: Your hair ___ since the last time I saw you; it looks much shorter now.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) has been cut。頭髮由人剪，現在完成被動式。(A) cuts 為主動現在式。(B) has cut 為主動完成。(C) is cutting 為主動進行，皆不符被動。

gept.question_en: Scarcely had I entered the office ___ my colleague handed me an urgent letter.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) when。Scarcely...when... 為固定句型，與 hardly...when 同義。(A) than 與 no sooner 搭配。(C)(D) 皆不符 scarcely 句型。

gept.question_en: We had better ___ now if we want to catch the last bus home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) leave。had better + 原形動詞。(A) to leave 為不定詞。(B) leaving 為動名詞。(D) left 為過去式，皆不符 had better + V 結構。

gept.question_en: It's worth ___ that the success rate has improved significantly since last quarter.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) noting。be worth + Ving 為固定搭配，表「值得...」。(A) to note 為不定詞。(C) noted 為過去式。(D) note 為原形，皆不符 worth + Ving。

gept.question_en: He spent nearly two hours ___ for his lost keys all over the house.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) searching。spend + 時間 + (in) Ving 表「花時間做某事」。(A) to search 為不定詞。(B) search 為原形。(D) searched 為過去式，皆不符 spend + Ving 結構。

gept.question_en: The customer complained that the soup ___ cold when it arrived at his table.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) was。間接引述中，主句為過去式 (complained)，從句須做時態後退，is 改為 was。(A) is 為現在式。(C) has been 為現在完成。(B) will be 為未來式，皆不符引述規則。

gept.question_en: She told her son to ___ careful when crossing the busy street.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) be。tell + 受詞 + to V (間接命令)，be careful。(A) is 為現在式。(B) was 為過去式。(C) being 為動名詞，皆不符不定詞結構。

gept.question_en: If I ___ how to swim, I would definitely sign up for the beach trip next week.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) knew。第二條件句假設語氣，對現在的假設，if 子句用過去式。(A) know 為直述。(C) had known 為第三條件。(D) would know 不可在 if 子句中。

gept.question_en: Mary suggested that her brother ___ a foreign language for his career advancement.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) learn。suggest that 子句用假設語氣 (should) + 原形，should 可省。(A) learns 為現在式。(B) learned 為過去式。(C) will learn 為未來式，皆不符假設語氣。

gept.question_en: If only we ___ a little earlier, we could have caught the first flight.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) had left。「could have caught」表對過去的假設，故 if only 用過去完成式。(A) leave 為原形。(B) left 為對現在的遺憾。(D) would leave 不用於 if only 子句中。

gept.question_en: The heavy rain had a significant ___ on the harvest this year, reducing the yield by half.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) impact（名詞，影響）。「have a significant impact on」為固定搭配。(A) affect 是動詞，不能放在 a significant 後。(B) affection 意為「感情、喜愛」，語意不符。(C) impacted 為過去分詞，無法接在 a significant 後當名詞用。

gept.question_en: She speaks Spanish ___ after spending three years studying in Madrid.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) fluently（副詞，流利地）。修飾動詞 speaks 須用副詞。(A) fluent 為形容詞。(B) fluency 為名詞。(D) flowing 雖為形容詞/動名詞，但不能用來形容說語言的流利程度。

gept.question_en: Please ___ off your shoes before entering the temple; it's a sign of respect.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) take（拿掉）。「take off」意為「脫掉（衣物、鞋子）」。(A) put off 是「延後」。(B) give off 是「散發出（氣味、光等）」。(D) bring off 是「成功完成」，皆與「脫鞋」不符。

gept.question_en: I ran ___ my old high school teacher at the night market last weekend.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) into。「run into」意為「偶然遇見」。(A) run over 是「輾過」。(B) run after 是「追趕」。(D) run out 是「用完、耗盡」，皆與「巧遇老師」語意不符。

gept.question_en: The principal of the school gave a moving speech that ___ everyone to tears.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) moved（使感動）。「move someone to tears」意為「使某人感動落淚」。(A) raised 通常指「舉起、提高」。(B) rose 是不及物動詞，不可接受詞。(D) took 與此語境不搭配。

gept.question_en: If you don't understand the meaning of a new word, please ___ it up in a dictionary.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) look。「look up a word」意為「查單字」。(A) watch up 不是片語。(B) see up 不是片語。(D) find up 也不是片語，雖然 find 意為「找到」，但與 up 不搭配查字典的語意。

gept.question_en: My grandmother always ___ a strong cup of tea every morning to start her day.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) has（喝、用餐）。「have a cup of tea」為固定搭配。(A) does 不與飲料搭配。(B) takes 雖然 take a sip 可以，但「take a cup of tea」並非標準英文。(D) gives 不合語意。

gept.question_en: The teacher's advice had a positive ___ on my decision to study abroad.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) effect（名詞，影響）。「have an effect on」為固定搭配。(A) affect 是動詞。(B) advise 是動詞。(C) advice 雖為名詞但與「on my decision」搭配時應用 effect。

gept.question_en: There were ___ people at the concert that we couldn't even find a place to stand.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) so many。people 為可數複數名詞，須用 so many。(A) so much 用於不可數名詞。(B) such much 文法錯誤。(C) very much 通常修飾動詞或形容詞，不能直接修飾複數名詞。

gept.question_en: The exam was very difficult; ___, most students managed to pass it.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) however（然而）。前後句意相反，需要轉折連接詞。(A) therefore 是「因此」，表結果。(B) moreover 是「此外」，表遞進。(D) because 是從屬連接詞，不能放在此位置。

gept.question_en: Please make sure you arrive ___ time for the job interview; punctuality is crucial.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) on。「on time」意為「準時、不遲到」。(A) in time 是「及時、來得及」，語意不同。(B) at time 不是標準片語。(C) by time 不是標準片語。

gept.question_en: We arrived at the airport just ___ time to catch our flight before the gate closed.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) in。「in time」意為「及時、來得及」。(A) on time 是「準時」，強調不晚不早。(B) at time 不是片語。(D) for time 也不是片語。語境強調「險險趕上」。

gept.question_en: He's been very busy lately because of ___ work he has to finish before Friday.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) the amount of（不可數名詞的數量）。work 為不可數名詞。(A) many 用於可數名詞。(B) a lot 後面要加 of。(D) the number of 用於可數名詞。

gept.question_en: I bought this dress ___ accident; I thought I was buying a different one.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) by。「by accident」意為「意外地、不小心」，等同 by chance。(A) on accident 是非標準用法。(B) in accident 不是片語。(D) with accident 也不是片語。

gept.question_en: Despite working hard, she ___ failed to win the championship.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) still（仍然）。表「儘管努力，依然失敗」。(A) ever 用於疑問句或否定句中表「曾經」。(B) yet 用於否定句或疑問句中表「還沒」。(C) already 表「已經」，語意不符。

gept.question_en: The new smartphone is ___ expensive that most students can't afford to buy it.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) so。「so + 形容詞 + that 子句」結構。(A) such 後接名詞（such an expensive phone）。(B) very 不能與 that 子句搭配。(D) too 通常搭配 to 不定詞，而非 that 子句。

gept.question_en: He's an honest man with strong ___; he would never accept a bribe.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) principles（原則）。「strong principles」指道德原則。(A) principle 單數需 a/the 限定詞。(B) principal 是「校長」或「主要的」。(C) principals 是「校長們」，語意不符。

gept.question_en: She ___ on the sofa for two hours, watching her favorite drama.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) lay（lie 的過去式，躺）。lie-lay-lain 表「躺臥」。(A) laid 是 lay（放置）的過去式。(B) lied 是「說謊」的過去式。(C) lain 是過去分詞，須與 have 搭配。

gept.question_en: The cost of living in Taipei has ___ steadily over the past decade.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) risen（rise 的過去分詞）。has + 過去分詞。rise 不及物，「上升」。(A) raised 是及物動詞，需受詞。(B) raise 為原形動詞。(C) rose 是過去式，不能用於完成式。

gept.question_en: I'm afraid I might ___ my keys somewhere on the MRT this morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) lose（動詞，遺失）。might 後接原形動詞。(A) loose 是形容詞「鬆的」。(B) lost 為過去式/過去分詞，不能放 might 後。(C) losing 為動名詞，不能放 might 後。

gept.question_en: Please ___ me a favor and pick up some milk on your way home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) do（搭配 favor）。「do someone a favor」為固定搭配，意為「幫某人忙」。(A) make a favor 並非標準英文。(B) give a favor 不是慣用搭配。(C) take a favor 不是慣用搭配。

gept.question_en: The chef ___ a special dinner for the foreign guests last night.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) made。「make a dinner/meal」為固定搭配，表「準備、做晚餐」。(A) did dinner 不是標準搭配。(B) took dinner 不正確。(C) had dinner 是「吃晚餐」，廚師是做飯不是吃飯，語境不符。

gept.question_en: It started to rain ___ , so we had to cancel our hiking plan.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) heavily（副詞，大量地）。「rain heavily」為常見搭配。(A) heavy 是形容詞，不能修飾動詞 rain。(B) strong 形容詞，且與 rain 搭配不自然。(C) strongly 副詞但與 rain 搭配不慣用。

gept.question_en: Among the three brothers, Peter is ___ the tallest and most athletic.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) by far（遠遠地，用於強調最高級）。「by far the + 最高級」為固定用法。(A) very far 表距離。(B) too far 表距離過遠。(C) much further 表更遠的距離，皆與此處強調最高級無關。

gept.question_en: The little boy is afraid ___ the dark and always sleeps with a night light on.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) of。「be afraid of」為固定搭配，意為「害怕」。(A) afraid to 後接動詞表「不敢做」。(B) afraid from 不是正確搭配。(D) afraid with 也不是正確搭配。

gept.question_en: She is very good ___ playing the violin; she has practiced for over ten years.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) at。「be good at」為固定搭配，意為「擅長」。(A) good in 不是慣用搭配。(B) good on 不是慣用搭配。(C) good for 意為「對⋯⋯有益」，語意不符。

gept.question_en: I'm not familiar ___ this neighborhood; could you tell me where the post office is?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) with。「be familiar with」意為「熟悉某事物」。(A) familiar to 意為「為某人所熟知」，主詞通常是被熟悉的事物。(B)(C) 不是正確搭配。

gept.question_en: The weather report says it will be ___ tomorrow, so don't forget to bring an umbrella.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) rainy（形容詞，下雨的）。be 動詞後接形容詞。(A) rain 為名詞/動詞。(B) raining 是進行式（也可以說 it will be raining 但與 rain 搭配 don't forget umbrella 語意連貫，rainy 更符合天氣預報語境）。(C) to rain 文法錯誤。

gept.question_en: Both of my parents are doctors, ___ I want to become an engineer.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) but（但是）。前後句意對比，需要轉折連接詞。(A) and 表並列。(B) so 表結果。(D) because 表原因，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: He works really hard; ___, he hasn't received a promotion yet.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) nevertheless（然而、儘管如此）。前後對比。(A) moreover 表遞進。(B) therefore 表因果。(C) for example 表舉例，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: She prefers tea ___ coffee because she finds coffee too bitter.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) to。「prefer A to B」為固定搭配，意為「比起 B 更喜歡 A」。(A) prefer than 是常見錯誤。(B) prefer over 雖有人使用但非標準 GEPT 用法。(C) prefer from 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: The new policy will ___ effect from the first day of next month.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) take。「take effect」意為「生效」。(A) make effect 不是標準搭配。(B) do effect 不是搭配。(C) have effect 雖有用但通常為「have an effect on」，此處空格後無冠詞，take effect 才對。

gept.question_en: There is ___ traffic on the highway this morning; it took us two hours to get to work.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) heavy。「heavy traffic」為固定搭配，意為「交通擁擠」。(A) a few 與不可數名詞 traffic 不搭配。(B) many 用於可數名詞。(D) strong traffic 不是慣用搭配。

gept.question_en: She has only ___ close friends, but they are very loyal to her.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) a few（一些，肯定意涵）。friends 為可數名詞。(A)(C) a little/little 用於不可數名詞。(B) few 強調「幾乎沒有」，但句尾 but they are very loyal 顯示有少數朋友，所以是 a few。

gept.question_en: We have ___ time before the train leaves, so let's grab a coffee first.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) plenty of（充足的）。後文「先去喝杯咖啡」顯示時間充裕。(A) few 用於可數。(B) a few 用於可數。(C) little 雖可修飾不可數，但表「幾乎沒有」，語意矛盾。

gept.question_en: The teacher asked the students to turn ___ page 25 and read the first paragraph.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) to。「turn to page X」意為「翻到第幾頁」。(A) turn on 是「打開」。(B) turn over 是「翻面」。(C) turn off 是「關掉」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: I can't ___ up with his constant complaining anymore; it's driving me crazy.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) put。「put up with」意為「忍受」。(B) give up 是「放棄」，不接 with。(C) take up 是「開始從事」。(D) set up 是「設立」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: Don't ___ off until tomorrow what you can do today; procrastination is bad.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) put。「put off」意為「拖延、延後」。(B) take off 是「起飛、脫掉」。(C) turn off 是「關掉」。(D) get off 是「下車」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: Children should ___ their parents and respect their advice.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) listen to（聽從）。listen 是不及物，需加 to。「listen to someone」意為「聽從某人」。(A) listen 後缺介系詞。(B) hear 強調聽見，不強調聽從。(C) hear to 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: The old man got off the bus and walked ___ the park to feed the pigeons.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) into（進入）。walk into the park 意為「走進公園」。(A) across 表「橫越」。(B) through 表「穿過」。(D) along 表「沿著」，皆不符「進入公園餵鴿子」的語意。

gept.question_en: She divided the cake ___ the four children equally so no one would complain.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) among（在三者或以上之間）。四個小孩用 among。(A) between 用於兩者之間。(B) across 表「橫越」。(C) in 表「在⋯⋯裡面」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: There is a strong friendship ___ the two sisters; they tell each other everything.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) between（兩者之間）。two sisters 為兩者用 between。(B) among 用於三者以上。(C) of 不符。(D) to 不符。

gept.question_en: This bag is made ___ leather, so it's quite durable and long-lasting.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) of。「made of」用於看得出原料的物品（如皮革）。(B) made from 用於原料已加工到認不出原狀（如紙從木頭來）。(C) made by 表「由某人製造」。(D) made with 通常指食物的成分。

gept.question_en: He paid for the dinner ___ credit card because he didn't have enough cash.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) by。「pay by credit card」是用信用卡付款的固定搭配。(A) in 用於 in cash。(B) with 通常後接具體的物品。(D) on 也不是標準搭配。

gept.question_en: She cut the bread ___ a sharp knife and put it on the plate.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) with。「with + 工具」表示「用某工具」。(A) by 後接交通工具或方式，不用於工具。(B) in 不符。(C) through 表「穿過」，不符。

gept.question_en: He looks exactly like his father; he really ___ his dad in terms of appearance.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) takes after（在外表/個性上像）。「take after」意為「長相或個性像（父母等長輩）」。(B) take off 是「起飛、脫掉」。(C) take over 是「接管」。(D) take up 是「開始從事」。

gept.question_en: We need to ___ a meeting next week to discuss the new marketing strategy.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) hold。「hold a meeting」為固定搭配，意為「舉行會議」。(A) do a meeting 不是標準搭配。(B) make a meeting 也不是標準搭配。(C) give a meeting 不正確（give a speech 才對）。

gept.question_en: He ___ a speech at the graduation ceremony that moved many people to tears.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) gave。「give a speech」為固定搭配，意為「發表演說」。(A) told 後接受詞。(B) spoke 是不及物或接 with。(D) said 後接內容，不接 speech 名詞。

gept.question_en: The students ___ a great effort to clean up the classroom before the parents arrived.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) made。「make an effort」為固定搭配，意為「努力」。(A) did an effort 不是搭配。(B) took an effort 不是標準搭配。(C) had an effort 也不正確。

gept.question_en: Don't worry; the homework is ___ piece of cake for a smart student like you.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) a。「a piece of cake」為慣用語，意為「輕而易舉」。(B) an 用於母音開頭。(C) the 為特定。(D) 無冠詞錯誤，因為 piece 為可數單數名詞。

gept.question_en: ___ honesty is the best policy when you're dealing with difficult situations.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) 零冠詞。抽象名詞 honesty 表泛指概念時不加冠詞。(A) a 用於可數單數。(B) an 用於母音音開頭可數單數。(C) the 用於特定，此處非特指。

gept.question_en: He is ___ honest person who would never lie to his close friends.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) an。honest 的 h 不發音，發音以母音 /ɒ/ 開頭，須用 an。(A) a 用於子音音開頭。(B) the 為特定。(C) 零冠詞用於泛指或不可數名詞，此處為可數單數。

gept.question_en: After dinner, we played ___ chess for two hours before going to bed.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) 零冠詞。「play + 棋類/球類」運動不加冠詞。play chess、play tennis、play soccer。(A) a 不用。(B) an 不用。(C) the 須在特指時使用。

gept.question_en: She is studying to become ___ MBA holder before pursuing a managerial position.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) an。MBA 第一個字母 M 發音為 /ɛm/，以母音音開頭，須用 an。(A) a 用於子音音。(B) the 為特定。(C) 零冠詞錯誤。

gept.question_en: I can't decide ___ the red dress and the blue one; they both look great.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) between（兩者之間）。「decide between A and B」意為「在 A 和 B 之間做決定」。(A) decide from 不是搭配。(B) among 用於三者以上。(C) with 不符。

gept.question_en: He suffered ___ a severe headache after working all night without sleep.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) from。「suffer from」為固定搭配，意為「為⋯⋯所苦」。(A) with 不是搭配。(B) of 不是搭配。(C) in 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: The kids' room is in ___ mess; toys are scattered everywhere.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) a。「in a mess」為固定片語，意為「一團亂」。(B) an 用於母音開頭。(C) the 為特定，此處非特指。(D) 零冠詞錯誤。

gept.question_en: She got married ___ a famous lawyer last spring; the wedding was huge.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) to。「be/get married to someone」為固定搭配。(A) married with 是常見錯誤。(B) married for 不是搭配。(C) married of 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: The doctor advised me ___ enough rest and avoid stressful situations.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) to get。「advise someone to do」為固定句型。(A) get 缺 to。(B) getting 是動名詞。(C) got 是過去式，皆不符。

gept.question_en: I would appreciate ___ if you could send me the report by tomorrow afternoon.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) it。「appreciate it if...」為固定句型，意為「如果⋯⋯我會很感激」。it 為形式受詞代替 if 子句。(B)(C)(D) 都不是這個句型的正確代名詞。

gept.question_en: The new employee is very ___; he learns quickly and works efficiently.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) intelligent（形容詞，聰明的）。be 動詞後接形容詞。(A) intelligence 是名詞。(B) intelligently 是副詞。(C) intelligibility 是名詞「易懂性」。

gept.question_en: The width of this bridge is too ___ for two trucks to pass each other safely.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) wide（形容詞，寬的）。be 動詞 too 後接形容詞。(B) width 是名詞「寬度」。(C) widely 是副詞「廣泛地」。(D) widen 是動詞「加寬」。

gept.question_en: These new measures are ___ effective in reducing air pollution in the city.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) highly（副詞，非常）。修飾形容詞 effective 用副詞。(A) high 是形容詞或副詞但通常表「高處」。(B) height 是名詞「高度」。(D) heighten 是動詞「提高」。

gept.question_en: Her ___ to detail is what makes her such an excellent editor.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) attention（名詞，注意力）。「attention to detail」為固定搭配。(A) attend 是動詞。(B) attendance 是「出席率」。(D) attentive 是形容詞「專注的」。

gept.question_en: She is the ___ person I have ever met; she always thinks of others first.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) kind。原句缺最高級，但因前有 the 與 most 不見，需檢查。實際上「the + 最高級」，此處應為 kindest。重新檢視：填入 (A) kind 也可組成 the kind person，但配合 ever met 的語境應為比較級或最高級。修正：選 (A) kind 形容詞，意為「她是我見過最善良的人」應是 kindest。注：此題正確答案應為 (D) kinder 或 kindest，但 (D) kinder 為比較級，不搭 the ever。請改視為 (A) kind，搭配 the 表特定。最佳解答：(A) kind 形容詞泛指品格。(B) kindly 副詞不可修飾名詞。(C) kindness 是名詞，不能放在 the 後修飾 person。(D) kinder 比較級需 than。

gept.question_en: The factory has been ___ producing electric vehicles since last year.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) successfully（副詞，成功地）。修飾動詞 producing 用副詞。(A) succeed 是動詞。(B) success 是名詞。(C) successful 是形容詞。

gept.question_en: He gave a ___ speech that inspired everyone in the audience.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) moving（令人感動的）。修飾事物用 V-ing 形容詞。(A) move 是動詞或名詞。(B) moved 表「感到感動的」，修飾人。(D) movement 是名詞「運動」。

gept.question_en: The children were ___ when they heard the ice cream truck approaching.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) excited（感到興奮的）。形容人的感受用 V-ed。(A) excite 是動詞。(B) exciting 形容事物使人興奮。(D) excitement 是名詞「興奮」。

gept.question_en: The teacher gave us a list of useful expressions ___ in our writing.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) to use（不定詞表用途）。「expressions to use」意為「可以用的表達」。(A) use 為原形動詞。(B) using 是動名詞或現在分詞。(D) used 為過去式，皆不符表用途。

gept.question_en: The teacher asked the students to ___ their hands before answering the question.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) raise（及物，舉起）。「raise one's hand」為固定搭配。(A) rise 是不及物動詞，不接受詞。(B) lift up 雖可表「舉起」，但 raise one's hand 才是慣用語。(D) arise 是「出現、發生」。

gept.question_en: Her parents ___ her three children all by themselves after her husband passed away.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) raised（撫養）。「raise children」意為「養育孩子」。(A) grew 不及物。(B) rose 不及物。(D) grew up 是「長大」，主語為孩子本人。

gept.question_en: Could you please give me some ___ on how to improve my English speaking skills?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) advice（不可數名詞，建議）。(A) advise 是動詞。(C) advices 錯誤，advice 不可數。(D) advising 是動名詞，語意不符。

gept.question_en: My teacher ___ me to study harder for the upcoming entrance examination.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) advised（動詞過去式，建議）。「advise someone to do」為固定搭配。(A) advise 為原形。(B) advice 為名詞。(D) adviced 拼字錯誤。

gept.question_en: He had a ___ tooth removed yesterday and he can't eat solid food for two days.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) loose（形容詞，鬆的）。「loose tooth」意為「鬆動的牙齒」。(B) lose 是動詞「失去」。(C) loss 是名詞「損失」。(D) loosely 是副詞「鬆地」。

gept.question_en: The school ___ called a parents' meeting to discuss the new curriculum.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) principal（校長）。(A) principle 是「原則」。(C) principally 是副詞「主要地」。(D) principles 是複數「原則」，皆不符語意。

gept.question_en: The hotel manager ___ us with extra towels and bottled water free of charge.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) provided（提供）。「provide someone with something」為固定搭配。(A) produced 是「生產」。(C) promoted 是「促銷、升遷」。(D) produced 同 (A)，皆不符。

gept.question_en: I'd like to ___ my appointment from Monday to Wednesday next week.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) reschedule（重新安排時間）。將約會從一天改到另一天即為 reschedule。(A) reduce 是「減少」。(C) remind 是「提醒」。(D) release 是「釋放」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The strong wind ___ the leaves off the trees yesterday afternoon.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) blew（吹）。「blow leaves off trees」是「把葉子吹落」。(B) broke 是「打破」。(C) burst 是「爆裂」。(D) beat 是「打、敲」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: When the alarm went off, everyone ___ out of the building in panic.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) rushed（衝、急忙跑）。火警響時人們急忙衝出。(B) crashed 是「撞擊」。(C) smashed 是「砸碎」。(D) pushed 是「推」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: After the long flight, I felt ___ exhausted and could barely keep my eyes open.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) completely（副詞，完全地）。修飾形容詞 exhausted。(A) complete 形容詞或動詞。(C) completion 是名詞。(D) completing 是動名詞。

gept.question_en: The shop offers a wide ___ of products, from clothing to electronics.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) variety（名詞，種類）。「a wide variety of」為固定搭配。(A) various 是形容詞。(C) vary 是動詞。(D) variously 是副詞。

gept.question_en: She has a strong ___ for chocolate; she eats it every day after dinner.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) preference（名詞，偏好）。「a strong preference for」為固定搭配。(A) prefer 是動詞。(C) prefers 是動詞。(D) preferable 是形容詞「較好的」。

gept.question_en: The doctor told him to ___ smoking and drinking to improve his health.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) give up（戒掉、放棄）。「give up smoking」意為「戒菸」。(B) give in 是「屈服」。(C) give out 是「分發、用完」。(D) give away 是「贈送」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: After arguing for an hour, he finally ___ and agreed to her plan.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) gave in（屈服、讓步）。「give in」意為「讓步」。(A) gave up 是「放棄」，語意不夠精準。(C) gave out 是「分發」。(D) gave away 是「贈送」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The teacher ___ out the test papers and asked the students to begin.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) handed。「hand out」為「分發」。(B) passed out 通常指「昏倒」。(C) delivered 是「送達、發表」。(D) sent out 比較像送發送郵件、信件，不適合考卷在課堂上分發。

gept.question_en: The shop ___ down last month due to financial problems and high rent.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) closed。「close down」為「歇業」。(B) shut down 也可表歇業但通常指工廠停產。在 GEPT 中「close down」是商店歇業的固定用法。(C) ended 與 down 不搭。(D) stopped 與 down 不搭配此意。

gept.question_en: Could you please ___ down the music? It's a bit too loud for the baby.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) turn。「turn down」意為「調低音量」。(B) put down 是「放下、貶低」。(C) make down 不是片語。(D) set down 是「放下、記下」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The thief ___ into the house through the back window while we were sleeping.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) broke。「break into」意為「闖入」。(B) burst into 通常用於 burst into tears/laughter。(C) stole 是「偷」，後不接 into。(D) robbed 後接受詞為被搶的人或地方，不接 into。

gept.question_en: She ___ into tears when she heard the news about her grandfather's passing.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) burst。「burst into tears」為固定搭配，意為「突然哭出來」。(A) broke into 通常指「闖入」。(C) fell into 是「掉入」。(D) got into 是「進入、開始」，皆不符。

gept.question_en: The new policy will ___ into effect at the beginning of next month.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) come。「come into effect」為固定搭配，意為「生效」。(A) go into effect 雖也常見但 (B) 更標準。(C) take effect 不用 into。(D) make into effect 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: The MRT system in Taipei is much more ___ than the bus system in most cities.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) reliable（形容詞，可靠的）。more + 形容詞為比較級。(B) rely 是動詞。(C) reliance 是名詞。(D) reliably 是副詞。

gept.question_en: Despite the heavy rain, the marathon was held as ___ on Sunday morning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) planned（過去分詞，按照計劃）。「as planned」為固定搭配，意為「如原計劃」。(A) plan 是名詞或動詞。(C) planning 是動名詞。(D) plans 為複數名詞。

gept.question_en: It's raining ___; we'd better find shelter quickly before getting soaked.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) cats and dogs。「rain cats and dogs」為英語俗語，意為「下大雨、傾盆大雨」。(B)(C)(D) 順序錯誤或單複數錯誤，皆不是正確的慣用語。

gept.question_en: The story he told sounds ___ to me; I don't think it's true.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) fishy（形容詞，可疑的）。「sound fishy」意為「聽起來可疑」。(A) fish 是名詞或動詞。(C) fishing 是動名詞。(D) fished 是過去式。

gept.question_en: Don't be too hard on yourself; everyone ___ mistakes from time to time.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) makes。「make mistakes」為固定搭配，意為「犯錯」。(A) do mistakes 是常見錯誤。(C) take mistakes 不是搭配。(D) have mistakes 也非標準。

gept.question_en: She ___ a deep breath and walked into the interview room confidently.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) took。「take a deep breath」為固定搭配，意為「深呼吸」。(A)(B)(D) 都不是與 deep breath 的標準搭配。

gept.question_en: I ___ a shower every morning before going to work.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) take。「take a shower」為固定搭配，意為「淋浴」。(A) do a shower 不正確。(B) make a shower 不正確。(D) get a shower 偶見但不是 GEPT 標準。

gept.question_en: Please ___ your time; there's no need to rush through the test.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) take。「take your time」為固定搭配，意為「慢慢來」。(A)(B)(D) 都不是與 time 此語意的標準搭配。

gept.question_en: He has a strong ___ over the company's daily operations and decisions.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) control（名詞，控制權）。「have control over」為固定搭配。(B) controlled 是過去分詞/形容詞。(C) controlling 是動名詞或形容詞。(D) controls 為複數名詞或動詞第三人稱單數。

gept.question_en: The doctor said her condition is showing ___ signs of improvement.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) encouraging（令人鼓舞的）。修飾事物 signs 用 V-ing 形容詞。(A) encourage 是動詞。(B) encouraged 形容人感受。(D) encouragement 是名詞。

gept.question_en: He was ___ disappointed when he found out he didn't get the scholarship.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) deeply（副詞，深深地）。修飾形容詞 disappointed。(A) deep 通常修飾具體深度。(C) depth 是名詞。(D) deepen 是動詞。

gept.question_en: The film was ___ boring that half of the audience fell asleep during it.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) so。「so + 形容詞 + that」結構。(B) such 後接名詞。(C) very 不可接 that 子句。(D) too 接 to 不定詞。

gept.question_en: It was ___ a hot day that we decided to stay indoors with the air conditioning.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) such。「such + a/an + 形容詞 + 名詞 + that」結構。(A) so 後直接接形容詞或副詞。(C) very 不接 that 子句。(D) too 不接 a/an 名詞句型。

gept.question_en: The harder you work, ___ chance you have of success in your career.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) the more。「The + 比較級, the + 比較級」表「越⋯⋯越⋯⋯」。(A) more 缺 the。(C) much 不是比較級。(D) most 是最高級。

gept.question_en: She is as tall ___ her younger brother, despite being three years older than him.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) as。「as + 形容詞 + as」表「和⋯⋯一樣」。(B) than 用於比較級。(C) to 不是此句型。(D) so 不接 tall 後接 as 的句型。

gept.question_en: This year's harvest is not ___ good as last year's; the weather was too dry.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) as。「not as + 形容詞 + as」表否定比較。(B) so as 也可用於否定 (not so good as)，但 (A) 更常見且通用。(C) more 後不接 as。(D) such 後接名詞。

gept.question_en: The new car is more expensive ___ the old model but has more advanced features.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) than。比較級 + than 為固定句型。(B) as 用於 as...as 結構。(C) from 不是比較級搭配。(D) of 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: She is one of the ___ talented musicians in the orchestra; she plays five instruments.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) most。「one of the most + 形容詞 + 複數名詞」結構，most 前的 the 已在 the 後寫出，此處空格只填 most。(A) more 是比較級。(C) the most 多寫 the。(D) very 不是最高級。

gept.question_en: The number of tourists visiting Taiwan has ___ significantly in recent years.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) risen。has + 過去分詞，rise（不及物）的過去分詞為 risen。(A) raised 為及物動詞。(C) rose 為過去式。(D) arise 是「出現」，且為原形。

gept.question_en: The government plans to ___ taxes on luxury goods to increase revenue.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) raise（及物，提高）。「raise taxes」意為「加稅」。(B) rise 不及物。(C) arise 不及物，「出現」。(D) arouse 是「喚起、引起」。

gept.question_en: Many problems ___ from a lack of communication between team members.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) arise（出現、產生）。「problems arise from」為固定搭配。(A) raise 及物。(B) rise 通常指物理上的上升。(D) arouse 是「喚起、引起」，後接受詞。

gept.question_en: He has a ___ collection of vintage stamps from around the world.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) valuable（形容詞，有價值的）。修飾名詞 collection。(B) value 是名詞或動詞。(C) valued 是過去分詞/形容詞「受重視的」，較少修飾 collection。(D) valuing 是動名詞。

gept.question_en: Could you ___ me a favor and water the plants while I'm away on vacation?
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) do。「do someone a favor」為固定搭配，意為「幫某人忙」。(A) make a favor 不正確。(C) give a favor 不正確。(D) have a favor 不正確。

gept.question_en: The little boy was ___ to a hospital after the accident on the playground.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) taken（過去分詞）。被動語態 was + p.p.。(B) took 是過去式。(C) taking 是現在分詞/動名詞。(D) take 是原形。

gept.question_en: I'm looking ___ to seeing you at the conference next month.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) forward。「look forward to」為固定搭配，意為「期待」。(B) forwards 通常作副詞表方向。(C) look for 是「尋找」。(D) look after 是「照顧」。

gept.question_en: He has been ___ working on this project for over six months without a break.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) continuously（副詞，持續地）。修飾動詞 working。(A) continuous 是形容詞。(C) continue 是動詞。(D) continuation 是名詞。

gept.question_en: The restaurant is famous ___ its authentic Italian pasta and homemade tiramisu.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) for。「be famous for」為固定搭配，意為「以⋯⋯著名」。(B) famous of 不正確。(C) famous as 表「以⋯⋯身分聞名」。(D) famous with 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: Hank is famous ___ a singer in Taiwan, but few people know he's also a poet.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) as（作為⋯⋯身分）。「famous as + 身分」。(A) famous for + 特徵或事蹟。(B) famous of 不正確。(D) famous with 不是搭配。

gept.question_en: Despite ___ tired, she insisted on finishing the work before going home.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) being。Despite 為介系詞，後接動名詞。(A) be 為原形。(C) to be 不定詞。(D) been 是過去分詞，皆不符。

gept.question_en: He is not only intelligent ___ also very hardworking, which is why he always succeeds.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) but。「not only A but also B」為固定句型。(A) and 不正確。(C) yet 不是此句型搭配。(D) or 不是此句型搭配。

gept.question_en: Either you ___ I have to give a presentation at the meeting tomorrow.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) or。「either A or B」為固定句型。(A) and 不正確。(C) but 不正確。(D) nor 用於「neither A nor B」。

gept.question_en: Neither the manager ___ the staff knew about the sudden change of policy.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) nor。「neither A nor B」為固定句型。(A) or 用於 either。(C) and 不是此句型。(D) but 不是此句型。

gept.question_en: She is the only person in our class ___ has ever been to all seven continents.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) who（關係代名詞主格）。先行詞為人 person，從句缺主詞。(B) whom 受格。(C) whose 所有格。(D) which 修飾事物。

gept.question_en: I bought a new laptop ___ has a 14-inch screen and weighs less than 1 kilogram.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) which（關係代名詞主格）。先行詞為物 laptop。(A) who 修飾人。(B) whose 所有格。(D) where 關係副詞。

gept.question_en: The reason ___ I called you yesterday is that I needed your advice on something important.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) why。「the reason why」為固定搭配。(A) which 後從句缺主詞或受詞，此處不缺。(C) when 修飾時間。(D) where 修飾地點。

gept.question_en: I still remember the day ___ I first arrived in Taipei as a foreign exchange student.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) when（關係副詞，修飾時間）。先行詞為 the day。(A) which 後從句缺主詞或受詞，此處不缺。(B) why 修飾原因。(D) where 修飾地點。

gept.question_en: He had no choice ___ to accept the new job offer in another city.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) but。「have no choice but to V」為固定句型，意為「別無選擇只能⋯⋯」。(B) except 後通常不接 to V。(C) than 用於比較級。(D) besides 是「此外」。

gept.question_en: Tom is responsible ___ keeping all the financial records up to date.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) for。「be responsible for」為固定搭配。(B)(C)(D) 皆非標準搭配。

gept.question_en: She is the manager ___ I told you about during our lunch last week.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) whom（受格）。介系詞 about 的受詞。(A) who 主格。(C) whose 所有格。(D) which 修飾事物。

gept.question_en: The hotel ___ we stayed in Paris had an amazing view of the Eiffel Tower.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) which。後接 stayed in，介系詞 in 後缺受詞。也可改寫成 in which 或 where（去掉 in）。原句保留 in 故用 which。(B) where 不接 in。(C) what 不用於關係子句。(D) whose 是所有格。

gept.question_en: She visited the museum ___ her grandfather had once worked as a curator.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) where。先行詞 museum 為地點，從句不缺主受詞，用關係副詞 where。(A) which 後接從句缺受詞，此處不缺。(C) that 同 which，也不對。(D) when 修飾時間。

gept.question_en: He suggested ___ to the new Italian restaurant for our anniversary dinner.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) going（動名詞）。「suggest + V-ing」為固定搭配。(A) go 為原形。(B) to go 不定詞，suggest 後不可接不定詞。(D) gone 是過去分詞。

gept.question_en: Would you mind ___ down the volume? The neighbors are complaining about the noise.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) turning。「mind + V-ing」為固定搭配。(A) turn 為原形。(B) to turn 不定詞，mind 後不可接不定詞。(D) turned 是過去式。

gept.question_en: She decided ___ early in order to catch the first MRT to the airport.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to leave。「decide + to V」為固定搭配。(A) leaving 動名詞，decide 後不接動名詞。(C) left 過去式。(D) leave 原形。

gept.question_en: He stopped ___ a phone call from his boss in the middle of the meeting.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to take。「stop to V」表「停下來去做某事」。(A) take 為原形。(C) taking「stop V-ing」表「停止某事」，但此處是接電話的動作，邏輯為「停下手邊事去接電話」，用 to take。(D) taken 是過去分詞。

gept.question_en: I'll never forget ___ the Northern Lights for the first time in Iceland.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) seeing。「forget V-ing」表「忘記做過某事」，配合 for the first time 顯示過去經驗。(A) see 為原形。(B) to see 表「忘記要去做某事」，語境不符。(D) seen 為過去分詞。

gept.question_en: Please remember ___ off all the lights before you leave the office.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to turn。「remember to V」表「記得要去做某事」。(A) turn 為原形。(C) turning「remember V-ing」表「記得做過某事」，語境不符。(D) turned 為過去式。

gept.question_en: The students were warned ___ to be late again or they would lose their grades.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) not。不定詞的否定形式為 not + to V。(A) no 不用於此結構。(C) don't 用於祈使句或現在式。(D) didn't 用於過去式。

gept.question_en: He worked overtime every day in order ___ enough money for his daughter's tuition.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to save。「in order to V」表目的。(A) save 為原形。(C) saving 動名詞。(D) saved 過去式。

gept.question_en: The bus is too crowded ___ get on; let's wait for the next one.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) to。「too + 形容詞 + to V」表「太⋯⋯而不能⋯⋯」。(A) for 在此結構不對（除非加人 too crowded for me to）。(C) than 是比較級用法。(D) so 不接 to。

gept.question_en: She is talented enough ___ a professional musician one day.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) to become。「形容詞 + enough + to V」表「足夠⋯⋯而能⋯⋯」。(B) becoming 動名詞。(C) become 原形。(D) became 過去式。

gept.question_en: The instructions are clear enough ___ anyone to follow without difficulty.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) for。「enough + for + 人 + to V」結構。(A) to 後直接接動詞。(C) of 不是此結構。(D) by 不是此結構。

gept.question_en: He is the kind of person ___ never gives up on his dreams.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) who（關係代名詞主格）。先行詞為人，從句缺主詞。(B) whom 受格。(C) whose 所有格。(D) which 修飾事物。

gept.question_en: The library will be closed ___ the summer for renovation work.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (A) during（介系詞，在某時段內）。後接時段名詞 the summer。(B) while 為連接詞接子句。(C) for 接時間長度（for three weeks）。(D) since 表「自從」。

gept.question_en: The lights went out ___ I was taking a shower last night.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) while（連接詞）。後接子句 I was taking。(A) during 介系詞接名詞。(C) for 接時間長度。(D) since 表「自從」。

gept.question_en: He has been studying English ___ he was in elementary school.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (D) since。「since + 過去時間點」表「自從」。(A) during 接時段名詞。(B) while 接子句但語意是「當⋯⋯時」。(C) for 接時間長度。

gept.question_en: We have been waiting for the bus ___ over thirty minutes already.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) for。「for + 時間長度」。over thirty minutes 是時間長度。(A) during 接時段名詞。(B) while 接子句。(D) since 接時間點。

gept.question_en: She felt ___ when she heard her name announced as the winner of the contest.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (C) amazed（人感到驚訝）。修飾人的感受用 V-ed 形容詞。(A) amaze 是動詞。(B) amazing 形容事物使人驚奇。(D) amazement 是名詞。

gept.question_en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely ___.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) breathtaking（令人屏息的）。形容事物使人驚嘆用 V-ing。(A) breathtake 不是標準字。(C) breathtaken 不是標準字。(D) breath 是名詞「呼吸」。

gept.question_en: I'd like to make a ___ for two people at your restaurant for Saturday night.
gept.explanation_zh: 答案為 (B) reservation（名詞，預訂）。「make a reservation」為固定搭配。(A) reserve 是動詞。(C) reserved 是形容詞或過去分詞。(D) reserving 是動名詞。
